# Out Of Context

Explain the current situation from zero prior context. Use when the user says /vs-out-of-context, out of context, I have no context, or explain what is going on.

## Installation

Part of the `vs` plugin — see the repo README for Claude Code and Codex install instructions. Every skill is self-contained, so you can also copy this directory straight into your agent's skills folder.

## Structure

```
out-of-context/
  SKILL.md              # Skill definition
```
